name: UBA : Multiple blocked file uploads followed by a successful upload
notes: Detects when there is a high volume of blocked file uploads followed by a successful upload
bb_references: BB:UBA : Successful File Upload match at least 1 times in 30 minutes after any of BB:UBA : Multiple Blocked File Uploads match
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters
when BB:UBA : Successful File Upload match at least 1 times in 30 minutes after any of BB:UBA : Multiple Blocked File Uploads match
when at least 1 events are seen with the same Source IP, Destination IP in 30 minutes
thresholds: when BB:UBA : Successful File Upload match at least 1 times in 30 minutes after any of BB:UBA : Multiple Blocked File Uploads match
when at least 1 events are seen with the same Source IP, Destination IP in 30 minutes
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Multiple blocked file uploads followed by a successful upload on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters
AND when BB:UBA : Successful File Upload match at least 1 times in 30 minutes after any of BB:UBA : Multiple Blocked File Uploads match
AND when at least 1 events are seen with the same Source IP, Destination IP in 30 minutes
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Multiple blocked file uploads followed by a successful upload
